system.description:
As the devotee of a sanguinary god, a Blood Priest has magical powers for strengthening and supporting allies. Blood Priest Benefits. This partial Mage class is taken by an Adventurer alongside another partial class. A Partial Warrior/Blood Priest might be a crusader wielding steel and terror against evil, while a Partial Expert/Blood Priest might be an inquisitor who investigates dubious figures and mysterious events. All Blood Priests gain Pray as a bonus skill at level-0, or level-1 if it is already level-0. Even one who has learned these abilities only through scripture must master many ecclesiastical rites and rituals to activate their powers.
